docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $653.90 FILED BY LILLIE, CHEYANNE AS TO DEFENDANT NOBERT, MEGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT MEGAN NOBERT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT CHEYANNE LILLIE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT AT THIS EVENING'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NOBERT, MEGAN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LILLIE, CHEYANNE $861.89 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $891.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $870.65 FILED BY NOBERT, MEGAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LILLIE, CHEYANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LILLIE, CHEYANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOBERT, MEGAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CHEYANNE LILLIE AND DEFENDANT MEGAN NOBERT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LILLIE, CHEYANNE
